raw_entries.text: Match ends, Brazil 1, Morocco 1.
Second Half ends, Brazil 1, Morocco 1.
Attempt missed. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right.
Attempt saved. Ayoube Amaimouni-Echghouyab (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the bottom right corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil).
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Alisson Becker.

Foul by Fabinho (Brazil).
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Gabriel Magalhães.

Foul by Achraf Hakimi (Morocco).
